DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT TAINARA FREITAS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF KENDALL SMITH IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. NOTICE OF THIS ORDER AND THE AMENDED NOTICE OF DEPOSITION SHALL BE GIVEN BY OVERNIGHT MAIL. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,370.00 ARE GRANTED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT FREITAS AGAINST PLAINTIFF SMITH. SANCTIONS ARE PAYABLE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SEND PROPOSED ORDER TRACKING THE ADOPTED RULING OF THE COURT VIA EMAIL TO PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Laila Rahimi-Keshari, Esq. 415.777.1308; laila.rahimi-keshari@libertymutual.com) of Law Offices of Santana & Vierra for Defendant.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Prior Order Of The Court:

The unopposed motion for terminating sanctions is granted: Plaintiff's Complaint is dismissed with prejudice.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to tom@thomascohen.com.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Kendall Smith Deposition Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Counsel In Support Of Motion To Compel Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TAINARA FREITAS' Motion To Compel Kendall Smith Deposition:

Defendant Tainara Freitas' unopposed Motion to Compel the Deposition of Plaintiff Kendall Smith is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall appear for deposition within twenty days of notice of this order. Notice of this order and the amended notice of deposition shall be given by overnight mail. Sanctions in the amount of $1,370.00 are granted in favor of Defendant Freitas against Plaintiff Smith. Sanctions are payable within 30 days of notice of this order.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Kendall Smith Deposition Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Counsel In Support Of Motion To Compel Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Continued To Dec-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TAINARA FREITAS' Motion To Compel Kendall Smith Deposition.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Court has not received electronic courtesy copies of the Moving, Opposition, or the Reply papers. The Motion is continued to December 1, 2021 for counsel to provide electronic courtesy copies of Moving, Opposition, and Reply papers. Per the instructions posted on the department's website (https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/civil/law-motion), parties must attach electronic copies of discovery motion papers to an email addressed to Discovery302@sftc.org. The subject line of the email should state the case name and number and the continued hearing date.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
